narrative:
Union Township A (precinct in Clermont County) has 995 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.1 percentage points.
